title: 10 best herbal creams for depression
description: Lemongrass creams help with depression because of their unique ability to balance the body's emotions and promote relaxation. The calming properties of lemongrass work to soothe an anxious mind, reducing symptoms of stress and anxiety that often accompany depression. Additionally, the natural anti-inflammatory compounds in lemongrass cream can help regulate mood-boosting neurotransmitters, such as serotonin and dopamine, allowing individuals to feel more centered and grounded.
